moments.title: Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games Begin
moments.blurb: The Commonwealth Games officially open today in Glasgow, Scotland, featuring 11 days of world-class sport with the opening ceremony at the OVO Hydro.

angles.name: Opening Ceremony Excitement
angles.copy: Let the Games begin! The Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games kick off tonight with a spectacular opening ceremony. Who are you rooting for?

angles.name: Local Buzz in Scotland
angles.copy: Glasgow is buzzing! The Commonwealth Games are officially underway, bringing the world to our doorstep. What events are you most excited to watch?

moments.title: The Open Championship Aftermath
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship concluded on July 19 at Royal Birkdale, with Ryan Fox securing his first major title.

angles.name: Reflecting on the Champion
angles.copy: Still talking about The Open? Ryan Fox made history at Royal Birkdale. Where does his win rank for you among recent majors?

angles.name: British Golf Glory
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale delivered another classic Open. Were you watching the drama unfold as Ryan Fox claimed the Claret Jug?

moments.title: Bruno Mars Continues London Residency
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning superstar Bruno Mars plays the O2 Arena in London tonight and tomorrow, continuing his highly anticipated UK return.

angles.name: Live in London
angles.copy: Bruno Mars is LIVE in London tonight! If you're heading to The O2, get ready for a night of pure Hooligan magic. What's your must-hear track?

angles.name: 24K Magic on Stage
angles.copy: The 24K Magic is back! Bruno Mars plays London tonight and tomorrow. Who's got tickets to see the superstar?

moments.title: Self Esteem Headlines Cardiff Castle
moments.blurb: Rebecca Lucy Taylor, aka Self Esteem, brings her acclaimed show to Cardiff Castle tonight for a major outdoor headline performance.

angles.name: Cardiff Castle Spotlight
angles.copy: Self Esteem takes over Cardiff Castle tonight! Who's ready for an unforgettable evening with Rebecca Lucy Taylor?

angles.name: Live Pop Power
angles.copy: From 'I Do This All The Time' to 'Prioritise Pleasure', Self Esteem is one of the UK's most compelling artists. Catch her live tonight in Cardiff!

moments.title: Depot in the Castle: The Wombats & Sugababes
moments.blurb: Cardiff Castle hosts 'Depot in the Castle' on Saturday, featuring headliners The Wombats and special guests Sugababes.

angles.name: Indie & Pop Party
angles.copy: Depot in the Castle is ON tomorrow! Get ready for The Wombats and Sugababes bringing the hits to Cardiff Castle. Who's in?

angles.name: Weekend Vibes
angles.copy: The Wombats AND Sugababes at Cardiff Castle this weekend? Saturday is looking HUGE! What's your favourite from both bands?

moments.title: David Byrne at Cardiff Castle
moments.blurb: The iconic David Byrne brings his 'Who Is the Sky UK Tour' to Cardiff Castle on Sunday, promising a unique live experience.

angles.name: Sunday Sounds
angles.copy: David Byrne is at Cardiff Castle this Sunday! Get ready for a truly special night with the Talking Heads legend.

angles.name: Iconic Performer
angles.copy: David Byrne is bringing his unique artistry to Cardiff Castle this weekend. Which of his many projects is your favourite?

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, David Essex!
moments.blurb: British singer, songwriter, and actor David Essex, known for hits like 'Gonna Make You A Star' and 'Hold Me Close', turns 79 today.

angles.name: 70s Icon
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary David Essex! 'Gonna Make You A Star' is still a classic. What's your favourite David Essex track?

angles.name: British Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to British icon David Essex! His music defined an era. What's your top memory of his career?

moments.title: Happy 65th Birthday, Martin Gore!
moments.blurb: Martin Gore, co-founder, songwriter, and guitarist for the iconic electronic band Depeche Mode, celebrates his 65th birthday today.

angles.name: Depeche Mode Mastermind
angles.copy: Happy 65th Birthday to Martin Gore of Depeche Mode! The synth-pop pioneers wouldn't be the same without his songwriting genius. What's your favourite DM track?

angles.name: Electronic Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 65th Birthday to Martin Gore, the creative force behind Depeche Mode! Celebrating an electronic music icon today.

moments.title: Happy 57th Birthday, Jennifer Lopez!
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez, known for her chart-topping music and iconic film roles, turns 57 tomorrow.

angles.name: JLo Day Soon
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Jennifer Lopez turns 57 tomorrow. What's your ultimate JLo anthem for the dancefloor?

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: The one and only JLo celebrates her 57th birthday tomorrow! From 'Jenny from the Block' to 'On The Floor', she keeps the hits coming.

moments.title: Happy 83rd Birthday, Mick Jagger!
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on Saturday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Royalty
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Mick Jagger turns 83 on Saturday. What's your favourite Rolling Stones track featuring the iconic frontman?

angles.name: Ageless Performer
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 83rd Birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger this weekend! A true rock legend.

moments.title: Happy 77th Birthday, Roger Taylor!
moments.blurb: Queen's iconic drummer and songwriter, Roger Taylor, celebrates his 77th birthday on Saturday.

angles.name: Queen's Drumbeat
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to Queen's legendary drummer, Roger Taylor, this Saturday! His powerful drumming is unmistakable. What's your favourite Queen song he wrote?

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Celebrating Roger Taylor of Queen, who turns 77 this weekend! A true rock institution.

moments.title: Happy 77th Birthday, Maureen McGovern!
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer Maureen McGovern, known for her Oscar-winning theme songs like 'The Morning After', turns 77 on Sunday.

angles.name: Voice of a Generation
angles.copy: Wishing a wonderful 77th Birthday to Maureen McGovern this Sunday! Her voice graced some of the most iconic movie themes. Which is your favourite?

angles.name: Easy Listening Queen
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Maureen McGovern, who turns 77 on Sunday! Her timeless ballads are still adored worldwide.

moments.title: Happy 77th Birthday, Simon Kirke!
moments.blurb: Simon Kirke, drummer for legendary rock bands Free and Bad Company, celebrates his 77th birthday on Monday.

angles.name: Rock Drummer Legend
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the legendary Simon Kirke! From Free to Bad Company, his drumming laid the foundation for countless rock anthems. What's your favourite?

angles.name: Bad Company Beat
angles.copy: Celebrating Simon Kirke, who turns 77 on Monday! The powerhouse behind some of rock's biggest bands.

moments.title: Happy 72nd Birthday, Steve Morse!
moments.blurb: Guitar virtuoso Steve Morse, known for his work with Deep Purple, Kansas, and the Dixie Dregs, turns 72 on Monday.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 72nd Birthday to the incredible Steve Morse! His guitar work with Deep Purple and Kansas is legendary. What's your favourite riff?

angles.name: Deep Purple Power
angles.copy: Celebrating the magnificent Steve Morse, who turns 72 on Monday! A true master of the guitar.

moments.title: Happy 50th Birthday, Jacoby Shaddix!
moments.blurb: Jacoby Shaddix, the dynamic frontman of Papa Roach, celebrates his 50th birthday on Monday.

angles.name: Papa Roach Powerhouse
angles.copy: Happy 50th Birthday to Jacoby Shaddix of Papa Roach! From 'Last Resort' to their latest, he's still bringing the energy. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Rocking at 50
angles.copy: Celebrating Jacoby Shaddix, frontman of Papa Roach, who turns 50 on Monday! Still cutting my life into pieces!

moments.title: Happy 73rd Birthday, Geddy Lee!
moments.blurb: Geddy Lee, the iconic vocalist, bassist, and keyboardist for the progressive rock band Rush, turns 73 on Tuesday.

angles.name: Rush Legend
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the one and only Geddy Lee of Rush! A true titan of progressive rock. What's your favourite Rush epic?

angles.name: Prog Rock Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Geddy Lee's 73rd birthday on Tuesday! His unique voice and basslines defined Rush for decades.

moments.title: Happy 73rd Birthday, Patti Scialfa!
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter and long-time member of Bruce Springsteen's E Street Band, Patti Scialfa, celebrates her 73rd birthday on Tuesday.

angles.name: E Street Star
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the incredible Patti Scialfa! A vital part of the E Street Band and a talented artist in her own right. What's your favourite of her contributions?

angles.name: Rock & Roll Heart
angles.copy: Celebrating Patti Scialfa's 73rd birthday on Tuesday! Her harmonies and presence are essential to the sound of Bruce Springsteen.

moments.title: Happy 68th Birthday, Kate Bush!
moments.blurb: The influential and enigmatic British singer-songwriter Kate Bush turns 68 on Wednesday.

angles.name: Running Up That Hill
angles.copy: Happy 68th Birthday to the legendary Kate Bush this Wednesday! A true innovator in music. What's your all-time favourite Kate Bush track?

angles.name: Musical Genius
angles.copy: Celebrating the unique artistry of Kate Bush, who turns 68 on Wednesday! Her impact on music is immeasurable.

moments.title: Happy 63rd Birthday, Fatboy Slim!
moments.blurb: Norman Cook, better known as DJ Fatboy Slim, the pioneer of big beat music, celebrates his 63rd birthday on Thursday.

angles.name: Right Here, Right Now
angles.copy: Happy 63rd Birthday to the legend that is Fatboy Slim this Thursday! Get ready to praise him like he should be praised. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Big Beat Boss
angles.copy: Celebrating Norman Cook, aka Fatboy Slim, who turns 63 on Thursday! Still bringing the funk to dancefloors worldwide.

moments.title: Happy 62nd Birthday, Jim Corr!
moments.blurb: Jim Corr, guitarist, keyboardist, and backing vocalist for the Irish folk-rock band The Corrs, celebrates his 62nd birthday on Thursday.

angles.name: Corrs Family Man
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to Jim Corr of The Corrs this Thursday! Responsible for some truly beautiful music. What's your favourite Corrs song?

angles.name: Irish Music Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating Jim Corr, who turns 62 on Thursday! The Corrs brought a unique sound to the 90s and beyond.

moments.title: Happy 67th Birthday, Joe Elliott!
moments.blurb: Joe Elliott, the iconic lead singer of British rock legends Def Leppard, turns 67 on Friday.

angles.name: Def Leppard Frontman
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the one and only Joe Elliott of Def Leppard this Friday! Still bringing that 'Pour Some Sugar On Me' energy. What's your favourite DL track?

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Joe Elliott, who turns 67 on Friday! The voice behind some of the biggest rock anthems of the 80s.

moments.title: Happy 62nd Birthday, Adam Duritz!
moments.blurb: Adam Duritz, the distinctive lead singer of American rock band Counting Crows, celebrates his 62nd birthday on Friday.

angles.name: Counting Crows Voice
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to Adam Duritz of Counting Crows this Friday! From 'Mr. Jones' to 'August and Everything After', his voice is unforgettable. What's your favourite?

angles.name: 90s Rock Favourite
angles.copy: Celebrating Adam Duritz, who turns 62 on Friday! Counting Crows gave us some of the most enduring hits of the 90s.

moments.title: Happy 55th Birthday, Aphex Twin!
moments.blurb: Richard D. James, better known as the highly influential electronic music artist Aphex Twin, turns 55 on Saturday.

angles.name: Electronic Genius
angles.copy: Happy 55th Birthday to the visionary Aphex Twin this Saturday! A true pioneer of electronic music. What's your favourite track from the legend?

angles.name: IDM Innovator
angles.copy: Celebrating Richard D. James, aka Aphex Twin, who turns 55 on Saturday! His groundbreaking work continues to influence artists worldwide.

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart is updated weekly, with new entries and climbers dominating conversations across the country.

angles.name: Who's Number 1?
angles.copy: The Official UK Singles Chart is fresh! Who's holding strong at the top, and what new tracks are making waves this week?

angles.name: Chart Battle
angles.copy: Always a talking point! What's your current favourite in the UK Top 40? Any surprise climbers or new entries you're loving?
